screenshots.title: 1. Live Mail Console
screenshots.description: Signed-in browser frontend with smart status, AI drafting, saved groups, and saved attachments visible together.

screenshots.title: 2. Cross-Domain Delivery
screenshots.description: Recipient inbox on b.test after a real browser-driven send from a.test.

screenshots.title: 3. Concurrency and Stability
screenshots.description: One mailbox receiving a burst from multiple different senders without the service crashing.

screenshots.title: 4. Brute-Force Protection
screenshots.description: The login flow shows the real temporary lockout after repeated failed password attempts.

screenshots.title: 5. High-Frequency Send Limit
screenshots.description: The browser shows the real abuse-control response after repeated rapid sends.

screenshots.title: 6. Phishing Detection
screenshots.description: Suspicious content is opened in the real inbox with the smart review and warning context visible.

screenshots.title: 7. Attachment Management
screenshots.description: Saved attachments, thumbnails, compression, and reuse controls shown in the current compose workflow.

screenshots.title: 8. Attachment Send and Preview
screenshots.description: Receiver-side detail view with a real image attachment preview opened from the mailbox.

screenshots.title: 9. Independent Security Lab
screenshots.description: Separate attacker-versus-defender website with fresh threat-drill evidence and explanations.

screenshots.title: 10. Dedup Upload View
screenshots.description: Two logical uploads are visible in the frontend while the backend still performs blob deduplication.

screenshots.title: 11. Dedup Backend Evidence
screenshots.description: Browser-rendered evidence page proving that duplicate uploads collapse to one stored blob.
